subcodes.first_line: The Day of God hath indeed come, yet the people understand not. The Sun of Manifestation hath dawned from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی یوم الله و القوم لا یفقهون قد اشرق نیر الظهور من افق
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
